mood: Finance / Banking, dark professional with indigo accents — clean, trustworthy, data-rich

screens.name: Home Dashboard
screens.description: Primary dashboard showing total balance across all accounts, income vs expense summary for the current month, quick action buttons, a mini spending-by-category donut chart, and the 5 most recent transactions.
components: iOS Status Bar (light text)
Top Bar with greeting text (Good morning, Alex), notification bell icon with badge, and user avatar
Total Balance Card with gradient background (indigo to purple), showing total balance amount, and small month-over-month percentage change badge
Income / Expense Summary Row — two side-by-side mini cards showing monthly income (green arrow up) and monthly expenses (red arrow down)
Quick Actions Row — four circular icon buttons: Send, Request, Pay Bills, Top Up
Spending by Category Section — section header with 'See All' link, horizontal donut chart with legend showing top 4 categories (Food, Transport, Shopping, Entertainment) with amounts and percentages
Recent Transactions Section — section header with 'See All' link, list of 5 transactions each with category icon, merchant name, date, and amount (green for income, default for expense)
Bottom Tab Navigation — 5 tabs: Home (active), Transactions, Budgets, Analytics, Profile

screens.name: Transactions
screens.description: Full scrollable transaction history with search bar, filter chips (All, Income, Expense, category filters), and transactions grouped by date. Each transaction shows icon, merchant, category tag, and amount.
components: iOS Status Bar (light text)
Top Bar with screen title 'Transactions' and a filter/sort icon button
Search Bar with magnifying glass icon and placeholder text
Filter Chips Row — horizontally scrollable pills: All (active), Income, Expense, Food, Transport, Shopping, Bills, Entertainment
Monthly Summary Banner — compact card showing total spent this month, number of transactions, and average per day
Date Group Header — 'Today' label with daily total
Transaction List Items (3 items for Today) — each with category icon in colored circle, merchant name, category subtitle, timestamp, and amount with +/− sign
Date Group Header — 'Yesterday' label with daily total
Transaction List Items (4 items for Yesterday)
Date Group Header — 'Dec 18, 2024' label with daily total
Transaction List Items (3 items)
Bottom Tab Navigation — 5 tabs: Home, Transactions (active), Budgets, Analytics, Profile

screens.name: Transaction Detail
screens.description: Detail view for a single transaction showing full merchant info, amount, date/time, category, account used, location, attached receipt image, and notes. Includes edit and delete actions.
components: iOS Status Bar (light text)
Top Bar with back arrow, title 'Transaction Detail', and three-dot menu icon
Large Amount Display — centered amount with expense/income color, and status badge (Completed)
Merchant Info Card — merchant logo/icon, merchant name, category tag pill, and date-time string
Detail Rows Section — labeled rows for: Category, Account (Visa •••4582), Payment Method, Reference Number
Location Row — map pin icon with address text
Notes Section — user-added note text in a surface card
Receipt Attachment — thumbnail of attached receipt image with 'View Receipt' label
Action Buttons Row — 'Edit Transaction' secondary button and 'Delete' error-colored text button
Bottom safe area spacer

screens.name: Budgets
screens.description: Budget management screen showing overall monthly budget progress bar, then individual category budgets as cards with progress bars, spent vs limit amounts, and color-coded status (on track, warning, exceeded).
components: iOS Status Bar (light text)
Top Bar with screen title 'Budgets', month selector (December 2024 with arrows), and add (+) button
Overall Budget Card — large card with circular progress ring showing total spent vs total budget, remaining amount, and days left in month

Budget Category Cards (6 cards) — each card shows: category icon, category name, progress bar (color-coded: green under 70%, amber 70-90%, red over 90%), spent amount / budget limit, and a small remaining or exceeded label. Categories: Food & Dining ($420/$500), Transportation ($180/$200 — warning), Shopping ($310/$250 — exceeded with red), Entertainment ($85/$150), Bills & Utilities ($340/$350 — warning), Health & Fitness ($60/$100)
Add Budget Button — full-width secondary button at the bottom with + icon
Bottom Tab Navigation — 5 tabs: Home, Transactions, Budgets (active), Analytics, Profile

screens.name: Analytics
screens.description: Visual analytics and insights screen with time-period selector, spending trend line chart, category breakdown bar chart, top merchants list, and smart insights/tips cards.
components: iOS Status Bar (light text)
Top Bar with screen title 'Analytics' and export/share icon
Time Period Selector — segmented control: Week, Month (active), 3 Months, Year
Spending Trend Chart — line/area chart showing daily spending over the current month with a gradient fill, peak spending day highlighted, and average line
Income vs Expenses Comparison — two horizontal bars (green for income, red-ish for expenses) with amounts and net savings amount below
Category Breakdown — horizontal bar chart showing top 6 spending categories ranked by amount, each bar colored by category, with percentage and dollar amount
Top Merchants Section — ranked list of top 5 merchants by total spend, each with merchant icon, name, transaction count, and total amount
Smart Insights Card — surface card with lightbulb icon, insight title ('Spending Alert'), and description text about spending pattern (e.g., 'Your dining expenses are 23% higher than last month')
Bottom Tab Navigation — 5 tabs: Home, Transactions, Budgets, Analytics (active), Profile

screens.name: Accounts & Cards
screens.description: Manage linked bank accounts and cards. Shows a horizontally scrollable carousel of card visuals, then a list of all linked accounts with balances, and an option to add new accounts.
components: iOS Status Bar (light text)
Top Bar with back arrow and screen title 'Accounts & Cards'
Net Worth Summary — large text showing total net worth across all accounts

Cards Carousel — horizontally scrollable card visuals (2–3 cards): each card is a realistic credit/debit card shape with gradient background, masked card number (•••• 4582), cardholder name, expiry date, and card network logo placeholder. Cards have slightly different gradient colors
Card Details Row — for selected card: available balance, credit limit, and 'Manage Card' link
Linked Accounts Section Header — 'Bank Accounts' label

Account List Items (3 items) — each with bank icon, bank name, account type (Checking/Savings), account number masked, and balance. Accounts: Main Checking ($4,280.50), Savings Account ($12,840.00), Investment Account ($8,520.33)
Add Account Button — outlined button with + icon and 'Link New Account' text
Bottom safe area spacer

screens.name: Profile & Settings
screens.description: User profile screen with avatar, name, and email at top, followed by organized settings sections: Account, Preferences, Security, and Support. Each setting is a tappable row.
components: iOS Status Bar (light text)
Top Bar with screen title 'Profile'
User Profile Header — centered layout with large avatar circle, user name (Alex Morgan), email (alex.morgan@email.com), and 'Edit Profile' small outlined button
Account Section — section header, then tappable rows: Personal Information (chevron), Linked Accounts (chevron), Subscription Plan with 'Pro' badge (chevron)
Preferences Section — section header, then tappable rows: Currency (USD), Notifications (chevron), Appearance with 'Dark' label (chevron), Default Account (chevron)
Security Section — section header, then tappable rows: Change Password (chevron), Biometric Login with toggle (on), Two-Factor Auth with toggle (off), Privacy Settings (chevron)
Support Section — section header, then tappable rows: Help Center (chevron), Contact Support (chevron), Rate the App (chevron), About (chevron)
Sign Out Button — full-width text button in error color at the bottom
App Version Label — small centered text 'Version 2.4.1'
Bottom Tab Navigation — 5 tabs: Home, Transactions, Budgets, Analytics, Profile (active)
